name: Balanced Scorecard
summary: A strategic management framework that measures performance across four perspectives beyond just financial metrics.
whenToUseIt: When setting company objectives, evaluating performance beyond revenue, aligning marketing metrics with business strategy, building executive dashboards.
steps: Internal Process Perspective (operational efficiency, quality, cycle time)
Learning & Growth Perspective (employee skills, innovation, culture)
example: A SaaS company using a balanced scorecard — Financial: MRR and churn revenue; Customer: NPS and retention rate; Internal: deployment frequency and bug resolution time; Learning: employee satisfaction and training hours per quarter.
